name: Hidden Valley Bacon & Cheddar Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 ounce packet Hidden Valley Ranch Original
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the Hidden Valley Ranch Original dressing and Ranch Party Dip.
2. Add the sour cream to the bowl and mix well until combined.
3. Stir in the bacon bits and shredded cheddar cheese until evenly distributed.
4. Serve immediately and enjoy!
